allow:
Bash(echo "

### 10. **Analytics & Reports** ✅ **COMPLETE**
- ✅ Revenue analytics with date range selection
- ✅ Daily revenue tracking
- ✅ Order count analytics  
- ✅ Top selling products \(top 10\)
- ✅ Orders by status breakdown
- ✅ Beautiful charts with Recharts
  - Area chart for revenue over time
  - Bar chart for daily orders
  - Pie chart for order status distribution
- ✅ Summary cards with key metrics
  - Total revenue
  - Total orders
  - Average order value
  - Average daily revenue
- ✅ Date range selector \(7/30/60/90 days\)
- ✅ Responsive charts
- ✅ Empty states for no data

#### Analytics API Routes ✅
- ✅ \\`GET /api/admin/analytics/revenue\\` - Daily revenue data with summary
- ✅ \\`GET /api/admin/analytics/sales\\` - Top products, order status, daily orders

#### Analytics Page ✅
- ✅ \\`/admin/analytics\\` - Comprehensive analytics dashboard with charts

")
